name: io.github.oktopeak/clio-mcp
description: Connect Claude to Clio with 21 tools for matters, contacts, tasks, billing, and more.

environmentVariables.name: CLIO_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Client ID from your Clio developer application (Settings → Developer Applications)

environmentVariables.name: CLIO_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Client Secret from your Clio developer application

environmentVariables.name: ENCRYPTION_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Leave unset to auto-generate a key stored in the OS keychain (or ~/.clio-mcp/key.hex as fallback on headless Linux/WSL2). If set, must be a 64-character hex string — it will be migrated to the OS keychain on first use.

environmentVariables.name: CLIO_REDIRECT_PORT
environmentVariables.description: Local port for the OAuth callback listener (default: 5678). Change if 5678 is in use.

environmentVariables.name: CLIO_REGION
environmentVariables.description: Clio region: 'us' (default) or 'eu'. Controls API and auth base URLs.

environmentVariables.name: CLIO_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Override the Clio API base URL (e.g. https://eu.app.clio.com/api/v4). Use instead of CLIO_REGION for fine-grained control.

environmentVariables.name: CLIO_AUTH_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the OAuth authorization endpoint (e.g. https://eu.app.clio.com/oauth/authorize).

environmentVariables.name: CLIO_TOKEN_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the OAuth token endpoint (e.g. https://eu.app.clio.com/oauth/token).
